name: Set Project Parameters
description: Livetest override. Search precedence in resolveTemplatePath is localPath -> hubPath -> jsonPath (see proxvex.mts:81), so this file wins over both the synced Hub copy and the json/ default; every project-wide param the livetest needs must be listed here. Routes apk/apt through fast EU mirrors so Alpine/Debian pkg installs don't stall on dl-cdn.alpinelinux.org from inside the nested VM, AND points docker.io pulls at docker-mirror-test so docker-compose-based apps (zitadel, gitea, ...) don't try to reach Docker Hub over the broken double-NAT path. ghcr.io is NOT routed via ghcr_registry_mirror because zot-mirror is currently blocked by a PVE OCI extractor bug — dnsmasq in mirrors-ready already DNS-redirects ghcr.io to the working Distribution-based mirror at 192.168.4.48, so leaving ghcr_registry_mirror unset is correct.
